policy.tuning_inputs: Sanitized contract fixtures and captures declared development may guide rule shape and threshold.
policy.validation_inputs: Validation captures expose instability and are reported separately, never pooled into final metrics.
policy.final_evaluation_inputs: Final captures are scored only after the rule and threshold are frozen; results cannot trigger silent retuning.

evaluations.name: IoT-23 stable-endpoint C2 indicator
evaluations.frozen_rule: zeek-stable-endpoint-retry-001: six S0 attempts to one endpoint in five minutes

residual_gap: External results cover two behavior families in one historical research dataset. No product-wide accuracy claim is permitted.
